mapper.select: SELECT S.SCHEDULE_NO, S.MEM_NO, S.SCHTITLE_NO, T.SCHTITLE_NAME, S.LECTURE_NO, L.LECTURE_NAME, S.SCHEDULE_DAY, S.START_TIME, S.END_TIME FROM SCHEDULE S JOIN SCHEDULE_TITLE T ON (S.SCHTITLE_NO = T.SCHTITLE_NO) JOIN LECTURE L ON (S.LECTURE_NO = L.LECTURE_NO) WHERE S.MEM_NO = #{memNo}

SELECT L.*, D.DEPT_NAME FROM LECTURE L JOIN DEPARTMENT D ON (L.DEPT_NO = D.DEPT_NO) WHERE D.UNI_NO = ( SELECT D.UNI_NO FROM MEMBER M JOIN DEPARTMENT D ON (M.DEPT_NO = D.DEPT_NO) WHERE M.MEM_NO = #{memNo} )
AND L.LECTURE_NAME LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SCHEDULE ( SCHEDULE_NO, MEM_NO, SCHTITLE_NO, LECTURE_NO, SCHEDULE_DAY, START_TIME, END_TIME ) VALUES ( SEQ_SCHEDULE.NEXTVAL, #{memNo}, #{schtitleNo}, #{lectureNo}, #{scheduleDay}, #{startTime}, #{endTime} )

SELECT SEQ_SCHTITLE.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO SCHEDULE_TITLE (SCHTITLE_NO, SCHTITLE_NAME) VALUES(#{schtitleNo}, #{schtitleName})
